title: Magical Peruvian Beef Brochette
description: A traditional Peruvian dish featuring marinated beef, served in a pandan leaf wrap, perfect for a hangover cure. The combination of red wine vinegar and broiling creates a briny and springy texture.
instructions: Preheat the broiler to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together red wine vinegar, olive oil, garlic, and ginger to make the marinade.
Add the beef cubes to the marinade and mix well to coat.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Remove the beef from the marinade and thread onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Season with salt and black pepper.
Wrap each skewer with a pandan leaf, securing with a toothpick if needed.
Broil the skewers for 8-10 minutes, flipping halfway through.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional pandan leaves if desired.
